caveats.fact: The first submit execute argv put --yes in the expiry value slot. v0.10.1 rejected it during preview with zero signature, effect, or transaction; one deterministic correction followed.

A local readback helper filtered speculation.marketType while v0.10.1 lists speculation.type. The authoritative first commitment, position, and own-state reads were green; no protocol action was retried.
The first controlled-fill helper used unsupported --taker-risk-usdc instead of documented --risk-usdc. Commander rejected it before preview output or transaction.

The helper initially required exactly 1,000,000 wei6 after requesting a 1-USDC maximum; valid odds rounding produced 999,972 wei6. The gate was corrected to accept bounded round-down, with no transaction attempted under the failed gate.

The first 300-second quote batch passed the catchable window while pre-send gates were corrected. Both lanes were killed cleanly; every latent quote was allowed through expiry plus grace before loaded-state continuation.

With three active manual positions, ordered all-market quoting consumed bankroll headroom on earlier markets before total. A bounded maker-b total-only continuation stayed within the approved contest/market scope and produced the third green fill.

After all postgame writes completed, the run-local composite gate treated intentionally zeroed allowances as not-ready-to-trade, substituted spentPOL=999, and mislabeled the failure as official-final. Direct readback proved final zero and exact accounting; no completion-pass write was required.
